The all-in-one Solana Telegram trading bot

Buy, sell, copy-trade, run a volume bot, scan for rugs, set take-profit / stop-loss, and launch your own coin — all from Telegram. Free wallet, no sign-up.

Open in Telegram Open the web terminal

Everything in one bot

Most Solana Telegram bots do one job. SlimeWire packs the whole toolkit into a single bot so you never juggle five of them.

⚡ One-click buy & sell

Tap a preset amount to buy any Solana token from your own wallet, then sell 25/50/100% just as fast.

👥 Copy trading

Mirror any wallet's buys automatically — the moment it apes a coin, your wallet does too, with auto TP/SL.

📈 Volume bot

A rolling pool of fresh ghost wallets builds real, organic-looking volume and pads your holder count.

🛡️ Rug scanner

Paste any contract or $ticker for an instant SlimeShield safety read — mint/freeze authority, LP burn, holder concentration.

⏰ Limit orders & TP/SL

Arm market-cap-triggered buys and take-profit / stop-loss sells that auto-fire from your own wallet.

🚀 Launch a coin

Launch your own token on pump.fun or the SlimeWire launchpad straight from the bot and earn the creator fees.

🎯 Community snipe

Your whole group co-enters a dev's launch from everyone's own wallet the instant it goes live.

🌀 Signals & radars

Narrative Radar, Graduation Gauntlet, Alpha Radar and take-profit pings surface the next move before it runs.

How it works

From zero to your first trade in under a minute.

1. Start the bot
Open @SlimeWiredBot on Telegram — a free wallet is created for you in seconds. No seed phrase, no sign-up.
2. Fund it
Send SOL to your wallet (scan the QR). It lands in seconds, and you can export the keys to Phantom/Solflare anytime.
3. Trade anything
Paste a contract or $ticker for an instant scan, then tap ⚡ to buy. Add copy trades, volume, limit orders, or launch your own coin.

Does more than any other Solana bot

SlimeWire replaces a buy bot, a scan bot, a volume bot, a launchpad and a community bot — in one place, for free.

  • Buy bot — every group buy posts with a one-tap Quick-Buy from your own wallet.
  • Scan bot — paste a CA or $ticker, get an instant rug read + chart.
  • Volume bot — matches the web app: one wallet feeds a rolling ghost pool.
  • Launchpad — launch on pump.fun or SlimeWire and keep the creator fees.
  • Copy & snipe — mirror winners and co-enter launches as a group.
  • Full web terminal — the same wallet works on slimewire.org.

FAQ

Is SlimeWire free to use?

Yes. SlimeWire is free to start — no sign-up and no seed phrase to write down. You only pay a small per-trade fee plus standard Solana network fees.

What can the SlimeWire Telegram bot do?

Buy and sell any Solana token in one tap, copy-trade other wallets, run a volume bot, scan coins for rugs, set limit orders and take-profit / stop-loss, launch your own coin, and run community snipes — all from Telegram.

Do I need a wallet to use it?

No. SlimeWire creates a dedicated wallet for you in seconds, or you can import your own. You can export the private keys to Phantom or Solflare at any time.

Does it work with pump.fun?

Yes. Trade fresh pump.fun launches the moment they go live, snipe launches from your own wallet, and launch your own coin on pump.fun or the SlimeWire launchpad.

How is SlimeWire different from other Solana Telegram bots?

Most bots do one thing. SlimeWire combines a full trading terminal, buy bot, rug scanner, copy trading, a volume bot, a launchpad, and community tools in a single bot — for free.

Start trading in Telegram

Free wallet, no sign-up. Open the bot and paste any coin to begin.

Open @SlimeWiredBot Web terminal
